_bostrol: Ezels spreken zacht / honderdvierenveertig stem / het werk is gedaan

entries.name: Melvin
entries.bio: Newly hired labourer at Derriere's Factory. Worried about losing his job. Male.

entries.name: Wedgie
entries.bio: Longterm worker at Derrerie's Factory. Smokes. Thinks most people are 'idiots'. Does the bare minimum. Female.
entries.verbalTics: "hier is uw" x2, "is uw geld" x2, "hier is uw geld" x2

entries.name: Bad Ass
entries.bio: A radical that wants to be left alone. Pessimistic, edgy, philosophical and political. Is actually a Human (Cole Butte) who was turned into a donkey by the Gods by accident.
entries.verbalTics: Laat mij gerust (recurring dismissal ×3), 'k Veronderstel (grudging concession ×2), godverdomme (profanity peak ×3 + godverdomse adj ×1), Eindelijk! (payoff/release ×2 in E6)
entries.relationships: former human (Cole Butte); estranged from human family; reluctant mentor to the Foal in E3/E6 BadCave

contractionsAllowed.scope: free — heaviest 'k user in cast (×17). Cap rule: next word capitalized when 'k starts sentence

entries.negationRule: nie + niet both allowed — Bad Ass corpus has minimal negation overall (1 nie at R55, no niet); nie kept as heavy-Flemish character signature when it appears (parallel to Sad/Nice/Thirsty)

bulkTranslateExclusions.note: bulk translate will not alter — '...' ellipsis sfx (cross-language)

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ge/gij + u/uw paradigm; je → ge, je kan → ge kunt, je bent → ge zijt (2 cells flipped). Q2: jullie RETAINED (NOT gulle — gulle is Thirsty-specific). Q3: 'k KEPT as heavy-Flemish exception (heaviest in cast); 3 sentence-start cap typos fixed (R30, R32×2). Q4: godverdomme RETAINED (NOT godverdoemme — godverdoemme is Thirsty-specific). Q5: Stoere → Stevige Ezel ×2 (cross-character canonical fix; Sturdy's name disambiguation from Bad's own 'Stoere Ezel'). Q6: da → dat ×2. Q7: signatures kept (Laat mij gerust, 'k Veronderstel, Eindelijk). Q8: '...' sfx kept.

entries.name: Big Ass
entries.bio: Always sees the big picture or puts things into perspective. Yearns for bigger opportunity and responsibility; wants to make an impact.
entries.verbalTics: *oef!* (physical effort ×3), Kameraad (constant address ×8, capitalized), size descriptors: mega/gigantisch/geweldig
entries.dynamics: earnest, passionate, big-picture thinker; morale officer / speech-maker; herd's anxious-but-committed hero in E7 factory arc
entries.relationships: solidarity with herd, wants recognition; volunteers for danger, leaves no one behind

contractionsAllowed.scope: free, paired with het — Q4 lock (both forms accepted)

bulkTranslateExclusions.note: bulk translate will not alter — memorial register, 'Trouwe Ezel' kept for EN 'Trusty'
bulk translate will not alter — 'Betweter' kept for EN 'Smart Ass'

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ge/gij dominant (paradigm: ge/gij subject, u/uw object/possessive, jullie kept). Q2: niet only. Q3: ik only (no 'k, no da'k). Q4: 't and het both free. Q5: u/uw paradigm partners. Q6: jullie kept. Q7-Q9: cross-character sweeps. Q10: E3_Mine1FOpening four-name hot spot resolved.

entries.name: Child Joey
entries.bio: The boy. NL renders as 'Luukske Vermeulen' (Flemish diminutive Luukske + family name Vermeulen, shared with Grandma Kulan). 20 lines.

entries.name: Child Joey Kulan
entries.bio: A small boy who is also a great artist. He visits the Fannyside Farm to see the donkeys with his grandmother. Every year he plays baby Jesus in the nativity play in the Bumpkin church. He is killed in the fire of Ep2.

entries.name: Cole Butte  ColeMachine
entries.bio: Always a rebel and a bit jaded by being left behind by his mother at a young age. A robotics-wiz, he dreamed of going to Mecha City to make a difference in the world through science. He was forced to work in the mine after graduating. Became depressed after his father wasted his scholarship money. In the cave-in, he tries to save Lazy and when Lazy tries to 'send' herself, Cole's soul is sent to the Astral Plane, only to be rejected and return to his body, ultimately and mysteriously, transforming his body into that of a donkey.
entries.verbalTics: "de burgers van" x4, "burgers van mechalen" x4, "de burgers van mechalen" x4, godverdomme (13x)
entries.note: 'k:19, 's:1; markers: godver:16, nie:8, da:7, nen/ne:6; negation: nie:8 niet:21

entries.name: Cole-Machine
entries.bio: The AI/robot version of Cole Butte (Bad Ass's pre-donkey human identity, real name Piet Vanscheetvelde). Appears in E9-E10 after Bad's transformation. Inherits Bad Ass's voice rules — heavy Flemish, ge/gij dominant, profane political/parliamentary register.
entries.verbalTics: godverdomme (×16, profanity peak), 'k (×19, heavy contraction user — inherits Bad's heaviest-in-cast trait), 'k Veronderstel (grudging concession), Mechalen (Mecha City — political/parliament setting)
entries.dynamics: philosophical, profane, political; passes Bad's edgy intellectualism into AI form
entries.relationships: former human (Cole Butte → Piet Vanscheetvelde); Bad Ass's pre-donkey identity, transformed into machine in E9; mentor to Foal in E9_BadCave / E10_Government

contractionsAllowed.scope: free — heavy 'k user (×19); cap rule when sentence-start

entries.negationRule: niet only — Tom directive 2026-04-29 (8 nie flipped to niet for ABN consistency, departure from Bad's heavy-Flemish corpus profile)

Q2: niet only ×8 (Tom directive — departure from heavy-Flemish nie pattern). Q3: da → dat ×6. Q4: jullie KEPT ×3 (per Bad). Q5: godverdomme KEPT ×16 (per Bad — NOT godverdoemme). Q6: 'k KEPT ×19 (heavy-Flemish exception).

entries.name: Foal named by audience
entries.bio: Born after the fire in Episode 2, she has never known a world of Humans. She just wants to play. She's very naive.
entries.verbalTics: "kijken naar mijn stenen-spel" (recurring game request), "wat als ik" (hypothetical starter), amai (4x), kameraad (21x), nonkel (21x)
entries.relationships: daughter of Sturdy Ass, born after E2 fire, never knew Humans, calls herd members Nonkel/Tante
entries.note: 'k:9, da's:4 — light contractions. Addresses everyone as Nonkel/Tante. -ke diminutive:10. Plays 'Stenen-spel' obsessively. 267 lines across E3/E6/E9/E10.

entries.name: Golden Ass
entries.bio: Mythological/religious figure. 90 lines. Reference to Lucius from Apuleius's 'The Golden Ass'.
entries.verbalTics: "wij zullen een" x3, "dat is niet" x3, "het astrale hiernamaals" x2

entries.name: Grandma Kulan
entries.bio: The grandma. Shares family name Vermeulen with Child Joey (related). 15 lines.
entries.verbalTics: "kom we gaan" x2

entries.name: Greedy Ass
entries.verbalTics: "laat maar zitten" x3, "maar zitten jong" x3, "laat maar zitten jong" x3

entries.name: Hard Ass
entries.bio: Strong, stoic, and blunt. Willing to make sacrifices to protect the herd. Coded as Antwerps burly — physically intimidating, well-intended.
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad (constant address ×8, capitalized), "Om uit de beerput te klimmen, moet er stront aan de hoeven hangen" (motto ×2), "Geen mietje zijn" / "GEEN MIETJE ZIJN!" (signature ×3), "Dat meurt hier nog al, man" (strongest Flemish moment), contemplative ... pauses throughout
entries.dynamics: stoic, blunt, protective, sacrificial; Antwerps-coded burly intimidation
entries.relationships: herd protector; willing to make sacrifices

contractionsAllowed.scope: free, paired with het — Q3 lock (both forms accepted)

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ge/gij + u/uw paradigm (Antwerps burly stoic). je → ge, jij → gij (emphatic), jou → u (object), jouw → uw (possessive). V2 inversion adds -t for ge (win je → wint ge); je bent → gij zijt (Flemish form); reflexive 'Bereid je voor' → 'Bereid u voor'; idiom 'in je eentje' → 'in uw eentje'. Q2: niet only (corpus clean). Q3: 'k forbidden / 't free. Q4: 'Let's go' R107 → 'Kom' kept (scene-specific); R21 → 'Let's go' kept verbatim. Q5: signature phrases (beerput motto, Geen mietje zijn, Dat meurt hier nog al man) kept. Q6: Kameraad ×8 already capitalized. Q7: 9 sfx + 'Let's go' R21 kept as-is.

entries.verbalTics: "nee jammer moest" x2, "jammer moest je" x2, "moest je terug" x2

entries.name: Haw
entries.bio: Donkey deity. Paired with Hee. 17 lines.
entries.verbalTics: "de materiële wereld" x2

entries.name: Hee
entries.bio: Donkey deity. Paired with Haw. Tom 2026-04-28: 'two donkey deities, zita and zeno' (corpus uses HIE/HAA). 29 lines.
entries.verbalTics: "ezel stap naar" x2, "stap naar voren" x2, "ezel stap naar voren" x2

entries.name: Historic Sign
entries.verbalTics: "de bron van" x4, "bron van yafur" x4, "de bron van yafur" x4

entries.name: Hugh G Butte
entries.bio: Alcoholic Mine boss. His diaries in Ep3 reveal his struggle to keep the Mine alive and his poor management skills. He used Cole's university scholarship money to buy a Boring Machine in an attempt to save the business. He is killed in Ep2 by Hard Ass.

entries.name: Kick Ass
entries.bio: Angry and impulsive. The brother of Sick Ass. Carries lots of shame for hurting Humans.
entries.contractions: 'k kept (Tom directive — Kick is heavy Flemish); 't free
entries.verbalTics: @#$%&! (5+ times, kept as is), godver(domme) (×3 explicit), Snotje (constant nickname for Sick Ass), VOOR WAT?! (×2), hè (sentence-final emphasis)
entries.relationships: brother of Sick Ass; lost her in E4; carries blood guilt for violence against Humans on Hard Ass's orders
entries.note: kameraad:5; "De Kudde kan mij een WORST WEZEN" (I don't care); "op hoeven en hoeven zitten" (begging); mixed nie/niet; je/jij dominant, ge/gij/uw at emotional peaks

contractionsAllowed.scope: kept (Tom directive — Kick is heavy Flemish; cap rule: sentence-start 'k → next word capitalized)

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ge/gij dominant strict (flipped 27 je-family with V2 -t adds: kan→kunt, ben→zijt, mag→moogt, hoor→hoort, etc.). Q2: niet only (eliminated 7 nie). Q3: 'k KEPT (Tom directive — Kick is heavy Flemish; cap rule applies). Q4: da-conj→dat (3 flips). Q5/Q6/Q7: curses kept (godverdomme/godver/verdomme — Kick's anger voice), Snotje×15 kept (sister address), kameraad×6 kept. 6 manual semantic patches: uppercase JE/JOU/JOUW/NIE flips, Gij bent→Gij zijt, ge kan→ge kunt, possessive ge<noun>→uw<noun>, Hoor ge→Hoort ge.

entries.name: Lazy Ass
entries.bio: A lazy donkey. Very easy going, almost surfer-esque in tone, just here for a good time. Died in the Mine collapse accident 1 year before events of the story started. Mate of Sad Ass. She is CARE FREE.
entries.verbalTics: 'Verveling is Vrijheid' (motto ×2), 'weet je wel?' (ya know? tag ×2 — was 'weet ge wel?' pre-retcon), 'kleintje' (affectionate to Foal), 'Later' (peace out), 'Merci', 'goesting', 'klapt' (vocab kept as character-color)
entries.relationships: Mate of Sad Ass; died in mine collapse 1 year before story; appears in afterlife/grave scenes (E3_LazysGrave) and Sad's nightmare (E6)

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: je/jij ABN paradigm (Tom retcon — flips opposite of corpus's ge/gij). 17 ge-family → je-family. Q2: niet only (×7 nie → niet). Q3: NO CONTRACTIONS — 'k → ik (×9), 't → het (×3 standalone), da → dat (×3). Q4: R5 'Luie Zak' self-ref → 'Luie' (intimate, matches R44). Q5: R34 'wa hangt er?' → 'alles kits achter de rits?' (Tom directive). nen → een (R37; Tom directive). Vocab kept: Merci, goesting, klapt, kleintje, Later (character-color).

entries.name: Mad Ass
entries.verbalTics: "ik dacht dat" x2, "dacht dat ik" x2, "dat ik water" x2

entries.name: Miner Jenny
entries.bio: Miner in Butte Mines. She grew up in Bumpkin. She was in a relationship with Cole Butte, but dumped him after he got depressed. She is killed by Hard Ass in Ep 2 while trying to get Hard Ass to save her computer from the fire—a computer that Cole made for her.

entries.name: Mme. Derriere
entries.bio: Factory matriarch — owns 'Mme. Derriere's Assorted Meats and Beauty Goods Factory' (Fabriek voor Gemengd Vlees en Schoonheidsproducten van Mevr. Derrière). 47 lines.
entries.verbalTics: "mijn fabriek zijn" x2, "het lijkt me" x2, "lijkt me dat" x2

entries.name: Nice Ass
entries.bio: Strong and fast. She loves to plow fields all day. She's energetic, modest, helpful, pure of heart. She would never break a promise.
entries.verbalTics: Oesje! (signature ×20), Amai! (Flemish surprise ×7, Tom-locked replacement for Jemig 2026-04-28), Jakkes! (Yikes ×6), potvolkoffie & verdikke (mild oaths), Kameraad (constant address ×7, capitalized)
entries.relationships: aunty figure to the herd, particularly to the Foal/young donkeys

contractionsAllowed.scope: free (zo'n etc) — Tom rule update 2026-04-28: 'n no longer flagged project-wide

entries.name: Old Ass
entries.bio: Classic Marxist/Leninist leader. Inspires the Herd in his lofty speeches. Dies early in the story; reappears in afterlife/flashback (E4_AstralPlaneMain).
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad ×7 (all capitalized), 'Jonge Kameraad' (specific address to Trusty/Foal), EZEL MACHT (catchphrase ×3), 'Ik wou dat' (wistful regret ×2), polsen + klapke (Flemish in formal mode), '...' dramatic ellipses throughout dying scene
entries.dynamics: sage leader, formal oratory, ideological speeches
entries.relationships: founder/elder of the Herd; mentor to Trusty Ass; passes leadership baton at death; reappears as guide in afterlife

entries.name: Radio Host Marcos
entries.bio: Radio interview for Mecha City. Enthusiastic user of Mme. Derriere's beauty products.

entries.name: Ringmaster Rico
entries.bio: Circus director. EN 'Ringmaster Rico' → NL 'Circusdirecteur Baptiste'. 113 lines.

entries.name: Sad Ass
entries.bio: Sad. Mourning his lover Lazy who died in the mines. Doesn't have direction in life anymore. He was a Mine donkey until he was sold to the Farm after Lazy died, unable to work anymore. He can be erratic and impulsive, taking out his anger on a car and accidentally starting the major fire of Ep2, or leaving the group behind in Ep5 from the Zoo.
entries.verbalTics: *boe-hoe-hoe-hoe* (whimper ×5+), *snik* (lighter cry E3+), *zucht* (sigh ×2), "Ik wou" (regret pattern ×3), "HET IS ALLEMAAL MIJN FOUT" (guilt explosion ×2), trailing ... throughout, Hallo'kes (Flemish greeting), Nonkel (Flemish: uncle)

entries.name: Sandy Butte
entries.bio: Cole's mother. Only appears in a flashback. She leaves home because of her abusive and alcoholic husband, Hugh.

entries.name: Sick Ass
entries.bio: Generally unwell from working in the mine, and later in the rain. Ends up being the chosen Vassal for the Gods to become the sacred Golden Ass.
entries.pronounForm: N/A (mute except for one spoken word)
entries.verbalTics: *KUCH* (de facto standard cough sfx, Tom directive 2026-04-28 — replaces former HOEST/KUCH register split). Single spoken word: 'Omdraaien.' at E6_Nightmare R48 (engine-tagged with {s}{s=10}…{/s}).
entries.relationships: sister of Kick Ass; chosen Vassal for the Gods (becomes Golden Ass)

entries.name: Sign
entries.verbalTics: "welkom op de" x4, "op de boerderij" x4, "de boerderij van" x4

entries.name: Slow Ass
entries.bio: Well-intentioned. Slow moving due to having arthritis. Timid, weary, unconfident. Looks up to Trusty.
entries.verbalTics: stutter on Dutch consonants (adaptive; dominant on b-/z-/p-/d-/h-/m-), *oe-oef* for *p-phew*, *snuf snuf* for *sniff*, *puf puf* for *puf puf*, trailing b-b-b… stutter gag (E4)
entries.relationships: deep reverence for Trusty; stayed behind to sing Song of Ascension for her (E2); departs with Kick Ass (E4)

contexts: when referring to Trusty Ass in memorial/reverent contexts
when addressing authority figures or out-of-herd characters (e.g., the Moth in E3)

entries.name: Smart Ass
entries.bio: Self-centred, egotistical, strategist. Always has another backup plan. Always looking out for her own (either self or group). Carries herself with an air of superiority — snooty, condescending, and convinced she's the smartest one in every room.
entries.verbalTics: Poepsimpel (signature ×18; her one deliberate Flemish word, untouchable). ÉÉN/TWEE/DRIE numbered plan sequences (×3 full plans). "EN ONZE JOBS TERUG TE GEVEN!" (rallying cry ending every plan). Acceptable expletives: Verdorie, Godsamme, Potverdikkie, Godver. Canonical expletive = Godsamme. NEVER full godverdomme; verdomme alone is also forbidden (use verdorie).
entries.dynamics: strategic, calculating, self-serving, intellectual; pedantic and snooty Dutch woman who has picked up some Flemish from the herd
entries.relationships: manipulates herd, looks out for own group

vocabularyOverrides.scope: all instances; NEVER full godverdomme for Smart Ass
standalone use; verdorie is the Smart-acceptable softening

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ABN je/jij dominant strict (eliminated 17 ge-family hits incl. ge/gij/u/uw with full verb conjugation adjustment). Q2: niet only (eliminated 7 nie). Q3: ik only (eliminated 4 'k); 't and 'n kept (Tom-confirmed exceptions). Q4: Smart-acceptable expletive set Verdorie/Godsamme/Potverdikkie/Godver, canonical Godsamme. Q5: da-conj→dat. Q6: Allez kom!→Kom nou! at E5_ZooMain J126. Plus mismatch fix at E10_Hard J5 (Tractor Machine NL was wrong-pasted into Smart's row; Tom-approved Dutch authored 2026-04-28). Codex correction: previously claimed flemishDensity=zero/ABN was inaccurate — corpus had 17 Flemish slips that have now been eliminated; she is now genuinely zero/ABN.

entries.name: Smelly Ass
entries.verbalTics: "dj lijpe ezels" x2

entries.name: Sturdy Ass
entries.bio:
Overprotective mother. She is pair-bonded with Old Ass. She lost her first daughter Lazy in the mine. She is racist against Machines. Can be overbearing a strict.

In the end, she changes her ways and spreads the story of asses.masses to other farm animals towards starting a greater revolution.
entries.contractions: 't free (signature heaviest contraction in cast); 'n free; 'k forbidden
entries.verbalTics: Kameraad (×30 — heaviest address user in cast); 't:35 (heaviest contraction user, 'tussentaal' opener pattern)
entries.relationships: pair-bonded with Old Ass, lost daughter Lazy, racist against Machines

contractionsAllowed.scope: free, signature heaviest contraction in cast

editorialPass.rulesLocked: RETCON 2026-04-28: Pronoun direction flipped from ge/gij to je/jij ABN per Tom directive. 55 cells reverse-flipped (ge→je, gij→jij, u→je or jou, uw→je, zijt→bent, moogt→mag, V2 -t drops, etc.) plus 1 over-correction fix (Omda→Omdat, ZIJT→BENT at E9_BadCave J55). Q2 niet-only, Q3 ik-only, Q4 da→dat retained from original pass. kameraad×30 + 't×35 still kept as voice signature. Density correction: light + ABN with tussentaal register. Files: data/editorial/sturdy-ass-corrections.json + data/editorial/sturdy-ass-retcon.json.

entries.name: The Masses
entries.verbalTics: "trouwe zak waar" x2

entries.name: Thirsty Ass
entries.bio: Older, a bit lecherous. Generally positive. Mostly interested in doing whatever Nice Ass is doing. Castrated. Dreams of starting a small business in the form of a Bar, called Bottom's Up (Poepegaatje).
entries.verbalTics: héé sentence-final (signature, ~50% of lines), JIE-HAAA! (yeehaw), godverdoemme/godver (×13 incl 5 godverdoemme post-flip), allez ×5, *oef!*, amai, sie, doeme/gedoemme. Drink puns: Bronnini, Emmer Ale, Spuugspritz. Bar name: Poepegaatje (Bottom's Up). Calls Nice 'Schoon Beest'.
entries.relationships: infatuated with Nice Ass; aspires to open Poepegaatje (Bottom's Up bar)

contractionsAllowed.scope: free — heavy Flemish exception (parallel to Kick Ass). Cap rule: next word capitalized when 'k starts sentence
free as casual idiom (Tom directive — kept for Thirsty's voice; differs from Nice's 'dat is' rule)
free — heavy Flemish form of 'dat' (sometimes 'dat de'). Character signature for plat Vlaams register
free — heavy Flemish demonstrative (parallel to dien/dienen/diej rule)

entries.articleRule: een or nen — both allowed (nen is heavy Flemish article, character signature)
entries.negationRule: nie + niet both allowed — Thirsty keeps mixed distribution as plat Vlaams character signature (parallel to Sad/Nice)

bulkTranslateExclusions.note: bulk translate will not alter — *slok* sound effect (Q5: was *gulp*, Tom directive 2026-04-28)
bulk translate will not alter — 'O!' interjection (Q5: was 'Oh!', Tom directive 2026-04-28)

editorialPass.rulesLocked: Q1: ge/gij + u/uw paradigm (heavy Flemish/plat Vlaams). je → ge, jij → gij. V2 inversion adds -t (Sta je → Staat ge, ga jij → gaat gij). je bent → ge zijt. jullie → gulle (Flemish plural). Q2: nie KEPT — 50/50 mixed distribution preserved as character signature. Q3a: 'k KEPT (heavy Flemish exception). Q3b: 't free, 'n free. Q3c: da → dat (4 cells); da't → dat het (R208 expansion). Q3d: da's KEPT as casual idiom. Q3e: dadde KEPT (option A). Q3f: nen at R302 KEPT. Q4: godverdomme → godverdoemme ×5 (Flemish slangier form, Tom directive). Q5: *gulp* → *slok*; Oh! → O!

entries.name: Trusty Ass
entries.bio: First met as more of a listener than a leader, she is accepted as Old Ass's second in command. When she dies, she longs to be reassigned so that she can become a better leader.
entries.verbalTics: "Ahh!" (startled ×2), "Het is maar.../Dat is..." (observation pattern throughout), "Ooeeeeps!" (Whoops — death line), "Ahum" (Ahem)
entries.dynamics: quiet authority, listener first, steady presence
entries.relationships: second in command to Old Ass; dies in E1 (falls in well); guide/reassigned in Astral Plane (E4)

contractionsAllowed.scope: contextual — idiomatic standard Dutch only ('t is, 't was, op 't einde, etc.)

inboundAddressRules.scope: bare 'Trusty' only — 'Trusty Ass' uses canonical Dutch name
inboundAddressRules.rationale: Nice Ass's affection diminutive for the player character

editorialPass.deprecationNote: Trouwe Zak removed from legitimate aliases 2026-04-20; only Trouwe Ezel (formal) and Trouwe (casual) used for direct reference

entries.name: Zookeeper Rose
entries.bio: Animal caretaker. EN 'Zookeeper Rose' is rendered in NL as 'Dierendokter Dina' (Animal Doctor Dina) — different role-translation. 140 lines.
entries.verbalTics: "van de week" x8, "ezel van de" x7, "ezel van de week" x7

entries.name: Foal
entries.bio: Child donkey character. Runtime-named via {$NewName} placeholder. Code-switches naturally between formal (uw/u/ge with elders, mirroring how adults like Sad/Nice use 'uw Nonkel' to her) and casual (je/jij with peers like Cole-Machine).
entries.verbalTics: Nonkel ×24 (uncle), Tante ×11 (aunt), Moeder (mother — addresses Golden Ass), child sfx (Huh?, Cool!, Coooool!, ...woah., AH!) kept as cross-language
entries.relationships: child of Sturdy Ass; nieces/nephews of Sad, Hard, Nice, Bad/Cole; chosen Vassal/Prophet adopted by Golden Ass

contractionsAllowed.scope: light use (×8 corpus); cap rule when sentence-start

registerExceptions.scope: child code-switching: formal register with adults
contexts: When addressing Nonkel/Tante or other elder donkeys (mirrors Sad/Nice's 'uw Nonkel' aunt-style register)
When addressing Golden Ass / Moeder (reverent register)

registerExceptions.scope: child code-switching: casual register with peers

inboundAddressRules.rule: Adults addressing the Foal use formal aunt/uncle register (uw/u/ge)
examples: Nice: 'uw schuld... maak u geen zorgen'
